title: fragariastrum divinum
intro: Fragariastrum divinum, also known as the 'Divine Strawberry Vine', is a flowering plant species belonging to the family of flowering plants, known as the Polemoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Fragariastrum divinum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
